page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, the instance provides dedicated, non-hyperthreaded CPU resources. The hardware configuration includes 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per core.

This instance operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 28 Gbps. The instance does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:8, the ecs.r9i.16xlarge is structured for memory-intensive workloads. It is suitable for hosting large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and data processing pipelines. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable compute performance, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for workloads requiring consistent memory capacity and processing power without the overhead of hyperthreading.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.16xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance configured with 64 dedicated physical cores and 512.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, it delivers dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor and features a baseline network bandwidth of 28 Gbps. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage. With a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, this server is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including in-memory databases, large-scale caching, and data analytics pipelines that require predictable, non-shared CPU performance.
